name: Visit Video Logger
releaseNotes: Fixes reported v0.1.1 issues: drops composed recording to 720p/30 for lower overhead, writes one-minute finalized MP4 clips for better crash survivability, moves recorder stop/finalization off the UI thread, only reports Saved after MediaRecorder finalizes cleanly, makes the OpenStreetMap panel larger and more opaque, rotates the map direction-up, preloads bounded tiles ahead of movement and around the current area, removes waypoint-like loading marks, stabilizes panel backgrounds, and displays fuller locality hierarchy with country code.
